name: lily-design-system-html-helpers
description: Lily Design System - HTML (web component) helpers catalog (dev/test harness)

scripts.build: found=0; for e in lily-design-system-html-*/index.ts; do [ -f "$e" ] || continue; found=1; d=$(dirname "$e"); echo "building $d"; tsup "$e" --format esm --dts --out-dir "$d/dist" || exit 1; done; [ "$found" = 1 ] || { echo 'build: no helper packages discovered' >&2; exit 1; }

author: joel@joelparkerhenderson.com
